_note: Canonical digital SAT content taxonomy. Drives the subskill-rules folder tree and name validation. Slugs are folder/file names; 'label' is the human-facing name. If College Board revises the framework, update here and update the subskill-rules tree to match.
_terminology: Hierarchy is section -> skill -> subskill. 'skill' = e.g. Algebra (College Board's own term for this level is 'domain'); 'subskill' = e.g. Linear equations in one variable (College Board calls this level a 'skill'). This tool uses skill/subskill throughout.

subskills.systems-of-two-linear-equations-in-two-v: Systems of two linear equations in two variables
subskills.linear-inequalities-in-one-or-two-variab: Linear inequalities in one or two variables

subskills.nonlinear-equations-in-one-variable-and-: Nonlinear equations in one variable and systems of equations in two variables

subskills.ratios-rates-proportional-relationships-: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
subskills.one-variable-data-distributions-and-meas: One-variable data: distributions and measures of center and spread
subskills.inference-from-sample-statistics-and-mar: Inference from sample statistics and margin of error
subskills.evaluating-statistical-claims-observatio: Evaluating statistical claims: observational studies and experiments
